$comment: Index of reusable product patterns Chief Wiggum can stamp into the apps it builds. See docs/patterns-registry.md. Each entry points at patterns/<id>/{pattern.md,manifest.json}.

patterns.title: Improvement Lifecycle Loop
patterns.summary: Autonomous, signal-driven, ratchet-gated fix-forward refinement installed into the product. Trusted-signal changes deploy autonomously; untrusted-signal (end-user) changes quarantine for blocking admin approval.

candidates.title: Protected Pathset + Deterministic Ratchet
candidates.summary: Monotonic quality high-water mark + fenced goalposts, embedded in the built product (CW already runs this on its own work).

candidates.title: Decorrelated Judge / Shadow Audit
candidates.summary: Referee model family must differ from the player model family; blind re-generation catches shared blind spots.

candidates.title: Gate-Only Holdout Split
candidates.summary: Train/holdout eval split; holdout withheld from the fixer's context to prevent overfit-and-ship.

candidates.title: Signal Ingestion + Findings Store
candidates.summary: Heterogeneous signals normalized into one uniform, pointer-only, idempotent Finding shape carrying a trust tag.

candidates.title: Business-Rules Registry
candidates.summary: Human corrections captured as provenance-bearing, version-controlled rules that outrank inference; the admin-approval trust gate rides on this.

candidates.title: Language-Agnostic Build/Test Floor
candidates.summary: Auto-detecting build+test gate across a polyglot repo.
